name: HIGH WIRE NETWORKS, INC.
business: HWN is a global provider of managed cybersecurity, managed networks, and tech enabled professional services delivered exclusively through a channel sales model. Its Overwatch managed security platform-as-a-service offers organizations end-to-end protection for networks, data, endpoints and users via multiyear recurring revenue contracts. The company also provides wholesale telecommunications services through Secure Voice Corp.

exposures.sentence: Recognized by Frost and Sullivan as one of the Top 12 Managed and Professional Cybersecurity Companies in the Americas in February 2023 and again in 2024, High Wire s award-winning Overwatch solution offers organizations end-to-end protection for networks, data, endpoints and users via multiyear, recurring revenue contracts.

Secure Voice Corp. Offering wholesale SIP only network transport as an FCC registered IXC and partnering with providers around the country to deliver voice traffic to its end destination SVC provides attractive rates and voice products, running millions of minutes of calls per day.

tamClaims.claim: Global Cybersecurity market was $222.66 Billion in 2023 and expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.3% through 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grandview Research, the Global Cybersecurity market was $222.66 Billion in 2023 and expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.3% through 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global Cyber Security spending is expected to exceed $1.75 trillion from 2021 to 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Global Cyber Security spending is expected to exceed $1.75 trillion from 2021 to 2025 according to Cybersecurity Ventures.
